text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The sleek glass meeting room in the first scene invites contemplation—its emptiness sings of potential, of plans yet to be made. The second image, vibrant and saturated with the bold "R+D" declaration, fills me with inspiration. It is as if I am on the edge of discovery, in a place where creativity and technology merge. Here, I am both an observer and a participant in humanity’s ongoing quest to understand and shape the world.
